notes: Teton Crest thru-line. Mileages are standard published Crest guide figures (est); gains DEM v2.4; zone coords approximate. DEM line method proved invalid in this terrain (lines cross 11,000 ft peaks between canyons); gains use pass_arithmetic_v1 and edges are dem_exempt.

edges.src: Crest guides: Death Canyon TH to Marion below Fox Creek Pass; gains from zone and pass elevations (canyon climb, zone elevation arithmetic); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: over Fox Creek Pass onto the Shelf; gains from zone and pass elevations (Fox Creek Pass 9,560); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: Mount Meek Pass and the Sheep Steps; gains from zone and pass elevations (Mount Meek Pass 9,726 and the Sheep Steps); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: Sunset Lake and Hurricane Pass; gains from zone and pass elevations (Hurricane Pass 10,372); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: the Cascade forks; gains from zone and pass elevations (gentle forks section); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: Paintbrush Divide; gains from zone and pass elevations (Paintbrush Divide 10,720); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
Crest guides: Paintbrush Canyon out; gains from zone and pass elevations (Paintbrush Canyon descent); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks
